query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN open_id IS NULL OR open_id = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_openid, SUM(CASE WHEN open_id LIKE 'local:%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as local_openid FROM users;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3x57m6Dk121nXW6.root --database Nz8norEy9cHW8BGGws8Uod --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN open_id IS NULL OR open_id = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_openid, SUM(CASE WHEN open_id LIKE 'local:%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as local_openid FROM users;
